name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Digging in
body:
LindseyGraham.com

Friend, I'm digging in, and I'm in this race to win.

Friend,

After a week of debate action and too much Donald Trump, I'm back
on the campaign trail visiting with conservatives in my home
state of South Carolina.

Friend, I'm digging in, and I'm in this race to win.

First order of business: reach our mid-month fundraising goals.
I'll be frank, I hate asking for money. It's my least favorite
aspect of campaigns, because I know money is tight for everyone.
But campaign contributions from people like you is what is
keeping our campaign running. No donation is too small, and with
your help I know we can meet our goal and keep our campaign on
track.

The deadline is only a few days away. Won't you give $5, $15, or
even $50 before midnight tonight to make sure we meet our
mid-month goal?

Because I refuse to back down on my strong national security
stances, many would like to see my campaign disappear. The
Democrats know I will defeat Hillary Clinton in a general
election and they are watching my campaign closely to see the
support we have.

I can't win without your support. Won't you please stand with me
right now?

Lindsey Graham

P.S. We have a mid-month fundraising goal that must be met this
week. Please visit this link now to make an instant online
contribution of $15 or more to help. Thank you.

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Dean Parker, BenCarson.com
subject: SURGING: Ben leads Hillary in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
|
Peter, there's no other way to put this...

After Ben's standout debate performance in Cleveland, _**our campaign is surging**_ \-- and two brand new polls should have you very encouraged.

**In the early-voting, swing state of Iowa, not only has Ben surged to second place, but he is now considered the strongest Republican candidate against Hillary Clinton in a general election, leading her 44-40.**

It is the support of genuine, hard-working Americans that is driving the momentum of this movement and we are making historic, undeniable progress.

**[Now is the time we need you to stand with us. Please make a donation to help Ben now.
](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29717612:28494573870:m:1:876315805:BA11B8169DADB868847D4576E6D92D60:r)** | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29717612:28494573870:m:1:876315805:BA11B8169DADB868847D4576E6D92D60:r)
---
The Washington political class wants you to believe that Ben can't win because he has no "political experience." Well, as Ben often says, those currently in charge have a collective 9,000 years of "political experience," and look where it has gotten us. More debt and more division.

Ben is a leader. He has wisdom. He is honest. He is a proven problem solver. He loves America, the Constitution, and cherishes the values that made us great.

So Peter, I'll end with this story. Recently while on the road with Ben in South Carolina, a man handed me with a check for $25. He said it was all he had left over for the month, and that he wanted it to go towards saving the country. It was a moment I won't forget.

[**In honor of this man and others like him, I ask you to dig deep and donate what you can.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29717612:28494573870:m:1:876315805:BA11B8169DADB868847D4576E6D92D60:r)

Together, we can help Ben defeat Hillary Clinton and lead us into a new era of freedom and opportunity for every American.

Winning together,

Dean Parker
National Finance Committee Chairman
Ben Carson for President

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29717612:28494573870:m:1:876315805:BA11B8169DADB868847D4576E6D92D60:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29717613:28494573870:m:1:876315805:BA11B8169DADB868847D4576E6D92D60:r)
---
|
---

---|---|---|---

name: Cliff Maloney
subject: Our secret weapon: "Students for Rand"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Today is the day.

Today we launch **Students for Rand**.

Students for Rand (SFR) is the official youth effort of the Rand Paul Presidential Campaign to recruit, organize, and mobilize young people to elect Senator Rand Paul as the next President of the United States.

In this critical election, a well-organized youth campaign will be the difference between winning and losing a key early primary or caucus state.

Students for Rand chapters will recruit new supporters, organize events, and mobilize students to vote for Rand Paul. Our mission is to build a youth army and establish an SFR chapter on every college campus in the United States.

In order to flex our muscle and show just how many students are ready to #StandWithRand, we are guaranteeing 300 chapters in our first 30 days. You read that correctly...

...We will build 300 SFR chapters by September 12th.

To help Rand Paul win, it's vital you forward this email to every college student you know. **[Please encourage them to #StandWithRand and apply to lead a chapter today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29719031:28500092142:m:1:879035888:0FE2E8B770EA671AD67471E4B33F1224:r)**.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29719031:28500092142:m:1:879035888:0FE2E8B770EA671AD67471E4B33F1224:r) Get ready to ignite the Rand grassroots with the youth passion for liberty.

In Liberty,

Cliff Maloney, Jr.
National Youth Director
Rand Paul for President

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29719032:28500092142:m:1:879035888:0FE2E8B770EA671AD67471E4B33F1224:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29719033:28500092142:m:1:879035888:0FE2E8B770EA671AD67471E4B33F1224:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29719034:28500092142:m:1:879035888:0FE2E8B770EA671AD67471E4B33F1224:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Here’s how the New College Compact affects you:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Learn how the New College Compact will help you. | Friend --

It’s almost that time of year: back-to-school.

But instead of feeling excited (or for those of us past our schooling days, nostalgic), millions of Americans are stressed about paying off the tuition and living expenses that come along with higher education.

**[Earlier this week, I rolled out the New College Compact -- my plan to help make higher education accessible for all of us. Take two minutes and find out how you’ll be affected.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMyNTkzOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMjQwODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Our country is stronger when everyday Americans can access the things they need to get ahead, starting with a solid education.

**So whether you’re preparing to enroll for the first time or you’re already burdened with huge loan payments, find out how my plan will help you:

[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/collegequiz/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjMyNTkzOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMjQwODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Hillary

---
******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjMyNTkzOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMjQwODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjMyNTkzOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMjQwODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMyNTkzOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMjQwODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMyNTkzOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMjQwODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjMyNTkzOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMjQwODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjMyNTkzOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMjQwODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMyNTkzOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMjQwODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: Hey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Huckabee for President
body:
|
### Friend,
### This is big news! Two battleground polls in the last two days show my Dad defeating Hillary Clinton. This means polls from Iowa, North Carolina, Arkansas, and Missouri now show him ahead of Hillary. ** However, we must keep the momentum going. And frankly we have to raise money to do that. This means polls from Iowa, North Carolina, Arkansas, and Missouri now show him ahead of Hillary. However, we must keep the momentum going. And frankly we have to raise money to do that. Thanks, Sarah Huckabee Sanders Campaign Manager Paid for by Huckabee for President | | * This e-mail was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Mike Huckabee for President Huckabee for President PO Box 3357 Little Rock, AR 72203 Phone: 1-844-780-6785 Fax: N/A

| Dear Friend,

This week, Ted and the Cruz for President team have been traveling through several southern states that will play a key role in selecting our Republican nominee for President -- the so-called "SEC Primary" states. Throughout the Southern Swing, Ted has met with thousands of courageous conservatives, and there has been a ton of great coverage from the press.

But there is one article in particular [**I wanted to make sure you saw**](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=TEeb5-2FMuQyoelyZpsAGcFB24i1xSUKFOJvcm2CKywmN1XJUydb1OglqXj7EdAUDukXagIqvNQDIEUUNUNWxTrC44hHD8-2F0kV0DJ98TkWwc70PNJOXF0PW3IEWf0iBD4C_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEfbsocaF1q-2BhIzDIaJztWrGU7kcIUzHYqRw3dVmBPceAU0hoCJA9MXK2JRNgG5ZHWkD04ayRyUg2SkVktdGpiNSeHz9McbbKUTwyGGND0mA9ncvno-2BwQuuuMvJFIzMweWDgVJb0p19ZzdgkLJvMVoQyJ5fkx4ybxoTFhsc1ALoBoNkUjORZ6qBbObvxU0tsRW0zRrZtWazAfr2o3ewHSoaBLmjcTvlr1yvz9DqCTAaEDrgCPC6YmHPxeDA62S2M8S5ZC3Xia73uU8kCQoBgC34L9fcTUxIoKug9lcY7OS0c0vA-2Fne0238SOBcpkbkHvV0-2FGN4Pta-2BVG5SXhBIYofU8YwaHagX-2FMJX-2FSApUzM4X5tr3qCmU1Rvhmr95dtanjoc-3D).

Earlier this week in Murfreesboro, there was a special and unexpected guest -- Pastor Gaylon Wiley. Pastor Wiley saved Ted's father, Rafael, and baptized Ted when he was eight years old.

[**The full article is below or you may read it here**](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=TEeb5-2FMuQyoelyZpsAGcFB24i1xSUKFOJvcm2CKywmN1XJUydb1OglqXj7EdAUDukXagIqvNQDIEUUNUNWxTrC44hHD8-2F0kV0DJ98TkWwc70PNJOXF0PW3IEWf0iBD4C_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEfbsocaF1q-2BhIzDIaJztWreIhB5g-2B9ulcAzYLV440yj8RB2YnN3HPPAuYLmZs85pFPfqrq7ZTGCr8wAUHrpSu4wSWB7L1l4-2FwoHRIlOGNCu1CZPZzAU4q-2BV2-2FJZAXTHhOPGw9-2FYCtD2BsmyS2RoxgqOnqEX5hPvgXPZalmfgw9clt2aYwT7aFUkfws9PIB7sE-2BkUMbz-2B-2Bt57MmWcTJul2QoQwHcjOcbQVi8KTCPioponRpU89hgzCCFB3nATZ3IdBr-2BgUninyNTba9qHRWFKW97NCZTfW9IV1d-2FwXBVXFaYwHGy9BLFMVgPqE323GU5zaREhwA3pPDBbRizrZe9jX-2F-2FO6NKkgdP-2FwdlWcdf5kNix3xAem5qTFRz2Xz6FkTerA-3D).

For liberty,

Jeff Roe
Campaign Manager
Cruz for President

[Ted Cruz rally turns personal in Murfreesboro](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=TEeb5-2FMuQyoelyZpsAGcFB24i1xSUKFOJvcm2CKywmN1XJUydb1OglqXj7EdAUDukXagIqvNQDIEUUNUNWxTrC44hHD8-2F0kV0DJ98TkWwc70PNJOXF0PW3IEWf0iBD4C_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEfbsocaF1q-2BhIzDIaJztWryfvYpZVEgRElDuAjILSyxDsFvJhz7I6AWiv3Dv7HxLqscB3kfcZBIQt28mqlzT7aGJtFEVBowh-2BUwt2tlbD7Ty0RitN0RaDzvP6KWtbgyOLLXwDn72KphCiRE6jcCRXeSPiqm3Jwj72Pu9rbKKe1pkFPLgEz0Jy6hT0GGcw-2ByaIP1-2FzogtduPFNzPZTcbMSQvprABZUTAMd6yidNazWLlGeHI4QGL37XtZmdF4NdW4h10bAXSpYcHoEzxFZJu6-2Ba1VRHYH-2BUX7sYfcBFsnad9UwAMvseICovKka6soNufZHN4Dbb7n2zN64iVjntCopMMJn-2Fu0XyMRZdyXIZcbkFH6OJTgOXlY4h1LiEZIYE664-3D)
WKRN
August 12, 2015

It was an unscripted moment like few others on the presidential campaign trail Monday in Murfreesboro, Tennessee.

Ted Cruz paused for a moment and looked into the audience at a community center for a man who changed his family's life.

"I was told Pastor Gaylon Wiley was here," he told the crowd. "I haven't seen Brother Wiley since I was a kid."

Then as the room with a thousand people fell silent, Cruz said "Brother Wiley led my dad to the Lord."

Out in the audience that day was Gaylon Wiley, who now lives in nearby Lebanon, Tennessee.

At most gatherings, Cruz tells the story of his wayward father Rafael who had left the family in Canada in the late 1970s.

"When I was three years old, my father left my mom. We were up in Calgary in the oil business and he came down to Houston and he decided he didn't want to be married anymore or be a father to his three year-old-son," said Cruz

But this time as the Texas Senator told the story, it was very personal.

In a slightly halting tone and brushing his eyes, Senator Cruz said "Brother Wiley baptized me at eight years old when I was a Christian, so I am really glad to be here in Tennessee."

The pastor who helped change the Cruz family nearly four decades ago in Houston, Texas, by baptizing not only the youngster, but the parents as well, was later embraced by the Republican candidate outside the Tennessee community center.

"I had the privilege of talking to Rafeal Cruz in the 1970s in a home just like Ted told it today," Pastor Wiley later told News 2. "And the Holy Spirit touched him so much he fell out of that chair on his knees and prayed the sinner's prayer and changed his life and flew back to Canada and got his family back together again."

And for a few minutes on Monday, the man who baptized the Cruz family caught up with that little kid from all those years ago who is now running for president.

At most gatherings, Cruz tells the story of his wayward father Rafael who had left the family in Canada in the late 1970s.

"When I was three years old, my father left my mom. We were up in Calgary in the oil business and he came down to Houston and he decided he didn't want to be married anymore or be a father to his three year-old-son," said Cruz

But this time as the Texas Senator told the story, it was very personal.

In a slightly halting tone and brushing his eyes, Senator Cruz said "Brother Wiley baptized me at eight years old when I was a Christian, so I am really glad to be here in Tennessee."

The pastor who helped change the Cruz family nearly four decades ago in Houston, Texas, by baptizing not only the youngster, but the parents as well, was later embraced by the Republican candidate outside the Tennessee community center.

"I had the privilege of talking to Rafeal Cruz in the 1970s in a home just like Ted told it today," Pastor Wiley later told News 2. "And the Holy Spirit touched him so much he fell out of that chair on his knees and prayed the sinner's prayer and changed his life and flew back to Canada and got his family back together again."

And for a few minutes on Monday, the man who baptized the Cruz family caught up with that little kid from all those years ago who is now running for president.

---
---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Don't give up on America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,
I believe with all my heart that this
election has to be about the future because America has always
been about the future. We have always been a nation proud of our
history and we have always believed what will come is greater
than what has passed. And if there's anything that troubles me
today, it's that some Americans' optimism about the future seems
to have eroded.
Yes, our country faces extraordinary
challenges, as it always has - but what country in the world
would you trade places with? The last time I checked, there
weren't boatloads of American refugees washing up on the shores
of foreign nations.
This is still a great country. What troubles
us is it can be even greater. What troubles us is that America is
not fulfilling its potential.
So the question before us is this - are we
going to give up and let the great experiment of America fail? Or
are we going to adapt to our new challenges and restore America's
greatness?
I love this country. It's been too good to my
family to not fight for it. I won't give up, and I don't believe
you will either. So today I'm asking you to click here and donate
whatever you can afford.
QUICK DONATE -> $7
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43410555:18631577738:m:3:1349778030:6C3FC673C2D05A26902EB84D649D3693:r
QUICK DONATE -> $11
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43410555:18631577738:m:3:1349778030:6C3FC673C2D05A26902EB84D649D3693:r
QUICK DONATE -> $27
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43410555:18631577738:m:3:1349778030:6C3FC673C2D05A26902EB84D649D3693:r
QUICK DONATE -> $43
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43410555:18631577738:m:3:1349778030:6C3FC673C2D05A26902EB84D649D3693:r

Click here now and donate $7, $11 or whatever you can afford and
help me get to The White House so I can fight for America's
future. Together we will usher in a new American Century.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43410555:18631577738:m:3:1349778030:6C3FC673C2D05A26902EB84D649D3693:r

Sincerely,

Marco Rubio

P.S. - Thank you for all the encouraging notes since the debate.
Campaigning across the country is tough, especially spending so
much time away from my family. It becomes a lot easier when I
know you're behind me. Click here now, donate a few bucks and
help fund our positive campaign.

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Too many emails? Click here to receive updates less often:
https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

Unsubscribe: https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: Chris wants to connect on Facebook
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
**[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f62/70cdc2ba/479b970b/3950554/307830157/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/join-our-digital-rapid-response-team")** Friend,

Things are really heating up. Since we emailed you on Monday, hundreds of supporters have joined our Digital Rapid Response team to help spread the word online about Chris's campaign for U.S. Senate, and we didn't want you to miss out.

Here's what we're looking for: savvy, plugged-in Democrats like you to be on the front lines getting our message out on social media about Chris and his record of effective progressive leadership. We know this race is going to come down to the wire, and with so much at stake we need you to join our Digital Rapid Response Team to help make Chris's message loud and clear.

**[Join Chris's Digital Rapid Response Team now!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f62/70cdc2ba/479b970b/3950554/307830157/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/join-our-digital-rapid-response-team")** Every step of the way, grassroots supporters like you have been an essential part of this campaign. Chris has been able to count on you for everything from knocking on doors to signing petitions to contributing ahead of fundraising deadlines. Now there's another way for you to help - by getting the word out on social media.

Whenever there's breaking news about our campaign, you'll be the first we turn to to help spread the word. So join our team, and bring your social media know-how to help push Chris's message across Maryland.

**[Chris needs your help to get his message out- sign up now to join the Digital Rapid Response Team!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f62/70cdc2ba/479b970b/3950554/307830157/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/join-our-digital-rapid-response-team")**

Thank you,

Team Van Hollen
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f62/70cdc2ba/479b970b/3950555/307830157/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Rick Santorum
subject: Vote: Which Ad I Should Run?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_vote&n=1)
---
Friend --
My campaign will soon begin running a national radio advertising campaign. And I would like your help in picking which spot you would like to see our campaign run.

[“Take Back America,”](http://www.ricksantorum.com/which_ad_should_i_run?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_vote&n=2) features our campaign theme song, and talks about my plans to reclaim America for the people who built it...hardworking families. [“Betrayal”](http://www.ricksantorum.com/which_ad_should_i_run?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_vote&n=3) discusses my belief that the Iran deal Obama negotiated is the greatest “betrayal” of national security in our country’s history. And how as President, I will never allow Iran to have a nuclear bomb. [Please make your vote now](http://www.ricksantorum.com/which_ad_should_i_run?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_vote&n=4). Our campaign would like to get up on the air as soon as possible. [VOTE HERE](http://www.ricksantorum.com/which_ad_should_i_run?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_vote&n=5)
Rick Santorum for President
[http://www.ricksantorum.com/](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_vote&n=6)

[ ](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/contribute?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_vote&n=7)

Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_vote&n=8).
You can also keep up with Rick Santorum for President on [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_vote&n=9) or [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_vote&n=10).

name: Official Bernie 2016
subject: Their Super PACs vs. Our Super PACK
body:
#
Friend -
Jeb Bush, Scott Walker, and Hillary Clinton all have Super PACs to raise unlimited amounts of money to support their campaigns. They're funded by millionaires, billionaires, and even some corporations.
We don't want any part of that. Bernie's not going to have a Super PAC.
**But we do want to build a Super PACK of supporters --folks who give a monthly contribution to our campaign, even if it's just a couple bucks.**
[**Click here to join Bernie's Super PACK with a $3 monthly contribution to our campaign.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb236e/43f17890/5de6a802/621d3db6/2650375356/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pack?refcode=em150813full&recurring=yes&amount=3")
When you join Bernie's Super PACK, we'll also send you this great sticker so you can let your friends and neighbors know how you're taking on the billionaires.
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb236e/43f17890/5de6a802/621d3db7/2650375356/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pack?refcode=em150813full&recurring=yes")
Monthly contributions are so critical to our campaign. **The reason we're asking you to give monthly is because it gives Bernie's campaign a sustained, predictable source of revenue.**
Knowing that every month we'll be able to count on contributions from our Super PACK means that we can build the organization we need to win.
The billionaire class shouldn't be able to buy our democracy. But they're trying. So far, Super PACs have raised nearly $300 million, according to the New York Times. Most of that money comes from some of the wealthiest people in America.
In fact, donations from fewer than 400 families account for half of the total money raised so far for the presidential election. Thanks to the disastrous Citizens United Supreme Court decision, there are even shell corporations donating more than a million dollars a piece to support candidates on both sides of the aisle!
We may not have the billionaire class or shadowy corporations, but we have you, friend.
[**Can you join Bernie's Super PACK with a contribution of $3 a month?**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb236e/43f17890/5de6a802/621d3db6/2650375356/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pack?refcode=em150813full&recurring=yes&amount=3")
Thanks for standing with us as we build our campaign.
\- Team Bernie

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb236e/43f17890/5de6a802/621d3db7/2650375356/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pack?refcode=em150813full&recurring=yes")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb236e/43f17890/5de6a802/621d3db4/2650375356/VEsP/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb236e/43f17890/5de6a802/621d3db5/2650375356/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb236e/43f17890/5de6a802/621d3db2/2650375356/VEsHBA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb236e/43f17890/5de6a802/621d3db3/2650375356/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
